lines.english: O servant Nanak, their Beloved Lord seems so sweet to them. ||2||1||23||
their minds are turned towards the Lord in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
hoping to meet God. ||1||Pause||
My mind wanders through the dense forest.
Malaar, Fifth Mehl:
It walks with eagerness and love,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਉਪਾਵ ਸਗਰ ਕੀਏ ਨਹਿ ਦੂਖ ਸਾਕਹਿ ਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aan upaav sagar kee neh dookh saakeh laeh |
lines.english: I tried everything else, but nothing could rid me of my sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਨ ਮਾਈ ਮੋਹਿ ਆਈ ਕਹੰਉ ਬੇਦਨ ਕਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: trai gun maaee mohi aaee kahnau bedan kaeh |1|
lines.english: Maya with her three gunas - the three dispositions - has come to entice me; whom can I tell of my pain? ||1||
Malaar, Fifth Mehl:
The glory of my Beloved is noble and sublime.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਜੁ ਸਰਨਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਮਿਲੁ ਗੁਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹਿ ਗਾਹਿ ॥੨॥੨॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: bhaj saran saadhoo naanakaa mil gun gobindeh gaeh |2|2|24|
lines.english: So hurry to the Sanctuary of the Holy, O Nanak; joining them, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe. ||2||2||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਨਿਤ ਲਲਿਤ ਗੁਨਗੵ ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਰੂਪ ਦਿਖਾਵਨੀ ਨੀਕੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhunit lalit gunagay anik bhaant bahu bidh roop dikhaavanee neekee |1|
lines.english: The most worthy beings sing God's Praises in beautiful harmonies, in all sorts of ways, in myriads of sublime forms. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਹਾ ਹੂਹੂ ਗੰਧ੍ਰਬ ਅਪਸਰਾ ਅਨੰਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਰਸ ਗਾਵਨੀ ਨੀਕੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: haahaa hoohoo gandhrab apasaraa anand mangal ras gaavanee neekee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The celestial singers and angels sing His Sublime Praises in ecstasy, happiness and joy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਰਿ ਤਰ ਥਲ ਜਲ ਭਵਨ ਭਰਪੁਰਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਲਾਲਨ ਛਾਵਨੀ ਨੀਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: gir tar thal jal bhavan bharapur ghatt ghatt laalan chhaavanee neekee |
lines.english: Throughout the mountains, trees, deserts, oceans and galaxies, permeating each and every heart, the sublime grandeur of my Love is totally pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਮਈਆ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਨੀਕੀ ॥੨॥੩॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: saadhasang raameea ras paaeo naanak jaa kai bhaavanee neekee |2|3|25|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the Love of the Lord is found; O Nanak, sublime is that faith. ||2||3||25||
Malaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਧਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur preet piaare charan kamal rid antar dhaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With love for the Guru, I enshrine the Lotus Feet of my Lord deep within my heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸੁ ਸਫਲਿਓ ਦਰਸੁ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਗਏ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਗਏ ॥
lines.translit: daras safalio daras pekhio ge kilabikh ge |
lines.english: I gaze on the Blessed Vision of His Fruitful Darshan; my sins are erased and taken away.
I am wonderstruck, stunned and amazed.
My mind is immaculate and enlightened. ||1||
You alone are, You alone are, O God.
I fall at His Feet, and touch my forehead to them.
Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, millions of sins are destroyed.
Rain down with happiness in God's Will.
Malaar, Fifth Mehl:
Your devotees take Your Support.
Servant Nanak has come to the Door of Your Sanctuary. ||2||4||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗੇ ਮਨੁ ਪਰਫੜੈ ਮਿਲਿ ਮੇਘ ਧਰ ਸੁਹਾਗ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant sange man parafarrai mil megh dhar suhaag |1|
lines.english: My mind blossoms forth in the Society of the Saints; soaking up the rain, the earth is blessed and beautified. ||1||
Bless me with total bliss and good fortune. ||1||Pause||
The peacock loves the thunder of the rain clouds.
I have renounced Maya, the deceiver.
Joining with the Saints, Nanak is awakened. ||2||5||27||
The rainbird's mind is drawn to the rain-drop
- so is my mind enticed by the Lord.
Malaar, Fifth Mehl:
Sing forever the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the World.
Enshrine the Lord's Name in your consciousness. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਤਜਿ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂਆ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd maan taj gumaan mil saadhooaa kai sang |
lines.english: Forsake your pride, and abandon your ego; join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਏਕ ਰੰਗਿ ਮਿਟਿ ਜਾਂਹਿ ਦੋਖ ਮੀਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har simar ek rang mitt jaanhi dokh meet |1|
lines.english: Meditate in loving remembrance on the One Lord; your sorrows shall be ended, O friend. ||1||
corrupt entanglements have come to an end.
The Supreme Lord God has become merciful;
Grasping the feet of the Holy,
Nanak sings forever the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the World. ||2||6||28||
The Embodiment of the Lord of the Universe roars like the thunder-cloud.
Singing His Glorious Praises brings peace and bliss. ||1||Pause||
Malaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਥਿਕ ਪਿਆਸ ਚਿਤ ਸਰੋਵਰ ਆਤਮ ਜਲੁ ਲੈਨ ॥
lines.translit: pathik piaas chit sarovar aatam jal lain |
lines.english: The thirsty traveller's consciousness obtains the water of the soul from the pool of nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨ ਸਰਨ ਤਰਨ ਸਾਗਰ ਧੁਨਿ ਅਨਹਤਾ ਰਸ ਬੈਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har charan saran taran saagar dhun anahataa ras bain |1|
lines.english: The Sanctuary of the Lord's Feet carries us across the world-ocean. His Sublime Word is the unstruck celestial melody. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦੈਨ ॥੨॥੭॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: har daras prem jan naanak kar kirapaa prabh dain |2|7|29|
lines.english: Servant Nanak loves the Blessed Vision of the Lord; in His Mercy, God has blessed him with it. ||2||7||29||
